description:
Enpass is a cross-platform password management app to securely store passwords and other credentials in a virtual vault locked with a master password. Unlike most other popular password managers, Enpass is an offline password manager.


Vault sharing now supports Google Shared Drives with more than 100 members
The "Manage Access" screen for a vault in the Share Center now displays the complete list of members for any Google Workspace Shared Drive, regardless of the group size. Previously, the list was limited to the first 100 members, which prevented administrators from granting vault access to everyone in larger organizations.

This version also includes other minor bug fixes and improvements.
